text: 该站点不允许嵌入预览，已显示参考布局。
translated: This site does not allow embedded previews. A reference layout has been displayed.

text: 持续监控 AI 推荐趋势，当竞争对手被更频繁引用时，提供实时预警与优化建议。
translated: 持续监控 AI 推荐趋势，当竞争对手被更频繁引用时，提供实时预警与优化建议。

text:
请先读取并严格遵循 workspace 技能 `{skillPath}` 及其 references 方法论。

站点：{url}

上一轮体检报告：
```json
{reportJson}
```

从缺口与站点内容提炼品牌事实，补全 valueProp 与 differentiator。

分析完成后，在回复末尾输出唯一一个 JSON 代码块（```json），严格符合以下 schema，不要输出其他 JSON：
{
  "brandName": "品牌名",
  "industry": "所属行业",
  "valueProp": "价值主张（一句话，可执行）",
  "audience": "目标受众",
  "differentiator": "差异化优势（2-3 句）",
  "competitors": ["https://竞品1.com"],
  "aiPreview": {
    "entity": "实体标签",
    "type": "业务类型",
    "audience": "AI 将识别的受众"
  }
}

valueProp、differentiator、aiPreview 各字段均不可留空。
translated:
Please first read and strictly follow the workspace skill `{skillPath}` and its references methodology.

Site: {url}

Previous health check report:
```json
{reportJson}
```

Extract brand facts from gaps and site content, complete valueProp and differentiator.

After the analysis, output only one JSON code block (```json) at the end of the reply, strictly following the schema below. Do not output any other JSON:
{
  "brandName": "brand name",
  "industry": "industry",
  "valueProp": "value proposition (one sentence, actionable)",
  "audience": "target audience",
  "differentiator": "differentiation advantage (2-3 sentences)",
  "competitors": ["https://competitor1.com"],
  "aiPreview": {
    "entity": "entity label",
    "type": "business type",
    "audience": "audience identified by AI"
  }
}

All fields in valueProp, differentiator, and aiPreview must not be left empty.
